intentSynonyms: look up place details in gmaps
fetch a single place details in gmaps
view one specific place details in gmaps
get place info by name or address in gmaps
description: Get details about a place on Google Maps by name or address. Fetches the place page and extracts available information including name, coordinates, and place ID. For complete details (hours, phone, reviews), use navigate_to_place to open the place in the browser.

query.description: Place name or address (e.g., "Statue of Liberty", "1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington, DC")
